Auth.2fa_desc: We have sent a 6-digit code to your email.
Auth.waiting_room_desc: Thank you for registering with Mazaya. Our team is currently reviewing your restaurant profile to secure your account and provision resources. We will send you an email as soon as your account is activated.
Auth.waiting_room_support: If you have any questions, please contact our support team.
Auth.otp_sent_notice: We sent a security verification code to:
Auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to your Mazaya account
Auth.forgot_password_subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset code

success.code_sent: Verification code sent to your email.
success.reset_code_sent: If an account exists for this email, a reset code has been sent.
success.password_reset: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.
success.reset_link_sent: If an account exists for this email, a password reset link has been sent.

errors.name_min: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.email_taken: An account with this email already exists.
errors.otp_expired: This code has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.reset_link_expired: This reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
